subject: Merge SDNR change to sdnc startODL script
commit_message:
Merge SDNR change to sdnc startODL script

Add SDNR feature and adjust netconf for cluster

Change-Id: Idec95539d0becc2f4c09e71e4b66616328775956
Issue-ID: SDNC-721
Signed-off-by: Herbert Eiselt <herbert.eiselt@highstreet-technologies.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Similar setup like before but removes odl-netconf-connector-all from featuresBoot. Test was done in my environment with container SDNC "1.5.0-STAGING-20190404..."

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/1891/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/1891

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Looks Good.Thanks Herbert
Please test if odl-netconf-clustered-topology feature remains in the final image and does’nt get removed.

Patch Set 1:

In the new image there is "single" node setup odl-netconf-topology configured. For cluster setup sdnc-"startOdl" script and now-oom-sdnc startODL script replacing this by odl-netconf-cluster-topology. This was tested and is working. If the final imange is available I will retst again. At the moment it is blocked by a build problem.
